dateline: Tampa, Florida — ARIRANG World Tour North America Leg Opens; 'SWIM' Tops Billboard Global 200 for Fourth Week
heroHeadline: BTS Opens North America Leg in Tampa — 60,000 Fans at Raymond James Stadium on Night One
heroSubtitle: 4,699 days since debut: BTS launched the North American leg of the ARIRANG World Tour on April 25, 2026 at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Florida — their first US stadium headline show as a full group since 2019. Approximately 60,000–65,000 fans attended opening night, the first of three sold-out dates (~180,000 total through April 28). 'SWIM' simultaneously topped the Billboard Global 200 for a fourth consecutive week, BTS's record-extending 8th chart-topper on that survey. US media coverage compared the fan mobilization to Beatlemania.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, Korea Times, Korea Herald, Yonhap, Bloomberg, Variety, AP News, UPI, Starnews Korea, Rolling Stone, PBS NewsHour, Euronews, City of Tampa, Business Observer Florida, WTSP Tampa Bay, FOX 13 Tampa Bay, Tampa Bay Times, Bay News 9, ArtThreat, and Recording Academy.
